databaseUrl.description: PostgreSQL URL for identity + token storage. Falls back to DATABASE_URL.

serviceAuthResource.description: Canonical SJ /mcp URI for openclaw→SJ M2M (P2). Becomes the Clerk M2M JWT `resource` claim; MUST equal SJ's validated /mcp URI. Falls back to SYNTROPY_MCP_RESOURCE_URL env.

databaseUrl.label: Database URL
databaseUrl.help: Must point to the same database as persist-user-identity.

serviceAuthResource.label: Service-Auth Resource (SJ /mcp URI)
serviceAuthResource.help: M2M `resource` claim target. Devex sets this per env; must match SJ's canonical /mcp URI byte-for-byte. Machine secret comes from CLERK_MACHINE_SECRET_KEY (Infisical).
